chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 164 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.761/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 05.03.2025 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mrs. Shahbana Naheed, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Agha Zeb Hussain Pathan, Advocate files his vakalatnama on behalf of petitioner, same is taken on record. SIP Allahdino, Investigating Officer Crime No.22/2024 of Police Station, Khuhra, District Khairpur is present and files statement, which reflects that final challan has already been submitted before the Court of law and one of the abductees namely, Mst. Samreen has fully supported the version of the complainant case; however on the directions of this Court, he has recorded statement the petitioner Mst. Aqilan Khatoon, wherein she has denied such allegations and she has been shown as witness in the case. Since the final challan has already been submitted in the Court of law, therefore, the instant petition having become infructuous is disposed of along with listed application. However, the police officials are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioner in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
